name: OWL
description: Optimised Workforce Learning multi-agent system ranked #1 open-source on the GAIA benchmark, orchestrating specialised sub-agents with 20+ real-world toolkits.

skills.name: Web Research Agent
skills.description: Deploy a browser-equipped sub-agent to search, navigate, and extract information from the web as part of a larger multi-agent workflow.

skills.name: Sandboxed Code Execution
skills.description: Run AI-generated Python code in an isolated execution environment and feed results back into the orchestrating agent loop.

skills.name: Workforce Dispatch
skills.description: Break complex tasks into specialised sub-tasks and assign each to a dedicated agent role with scoped tools and termination conditions.
